channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI is quietly splitting the housing market in two: Bay Area luxury homes are up 13%, affordable ones are collapsing
item.description: “It’s another sign of the K-shaped economy taking shape in the Bay Area,” said Redfin senior economist Yingqi Xu.

item.title: I litigated the JetBlue-Spirit merger. A few thoughts on the future of antitrust in the airline industry
item.description: A former DOJ Antitrust Division attorney who worked on the JetBlue/Spirit case argues that Spirit's collapse wasn't inevitable — but it should give re...

item.title: Wall Street has decided the war is already over as stocks rally globally on peace talk progress
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: After the FDA spent years rejecting over flavored vape products, Trump reportedly pressed his FDA commissioner to allow mango and blueberry flavors
item.description: “Flavors induce people, many of them children and young adults, to use a product that may result in a lifetime of addiction and other harms,” one anti...
